headline: Nordson (NDSN) Q2 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: Naga will discuss second quarter highlights.  Thank you for joining Nordson's Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Conference Call.  This is an 8% increase over the prior year, which is inclusive of 7% overall organic growth.

headline: Nordson (NDSN) Q4 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Naga will discuss fourth quarter and full year highlights.  Naga will conclude with high-level commentary about our enterprise performance, including an update on the Ascend Strategy, as well as our fiscal 2026 full year and first quarter guidance. headline: Nordson Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Nordson (NASDAQ:NDSN) reported record fiscal second-quarter sales and earnings, with management citing broad-based organic growth across all three business segments, stronger order activity and an 18% organic increase in backlog from the prior year.
